uplink.description: Soil sensor + battery (flags=0x0003): moist soil, 20 C, 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload built on the Decentlab v2 wire format (device id 571). Soil block word0=900 -> permittivity 900/50=18; cubic VWC calibration -> 0.3194776 m3/m3 -> 31.95 %; word1=600 -> (600-400)/10=20 C. Battery word=3000 -> 3.000 V. expected.data computed by porting reference/upstream-codec.js per-sensor formulas (VWC fraction x100 for soil.moisture).

uplink.description: Soil sensor only (flags=0x0001): drier soil, -15 C
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload, soil flag only. word0=750 -> permittivity 15; cubic VWC -> 0.2757625 m3/m3 -> 27.58 %; word1=250 -> (250-400)/10=-15 C (signed below-zero soil temperature). expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic in-bounds payload, battery flag only. Battery word=3300 -> 3.300 V; no soil block so soil.* is absent. expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic protocol-version-mismatch vector: first byte is 1 instead of the required v2. Mirrors the upstream version guard.
